# [AArch64] Assertion "This is not a register operand!" with AdvSIMD intrinsic and inline asm

**Author:** ostannard
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/157118
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** llvm:codegen, crash-on-valid, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-09-06T05:00:13Z

## Body

This AArch64 code triggers an assertion failure in `Machine InstCombiner` at all optimisation levels except -O0:
```c
#include <arm_neon.h>

uint8x8_t test_vaba_u8(uint8x8_t a, uint8x8_t b, uint8x8_t c) {
  asm volatile("" : "+w" (a));
  return vaba_u8(a, b, c);
}
```

```
$ /work/build/bin/clang -c test.c -O1
clang: /work/llvm-project/llvm/include/llvm/CodeGen/MachineOperand.h:369: llvm::Register llvm::MachineOperand::getReg() const: Assertion `isReg() && "This is not a register operand!"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
Stack dump:
```

```c
#include &lt;arm_neon.h&gt;

}
```
